isomorphism.ordering_preserved: yes: same-shape tensors are consumed with the same row-major zip order as the generic compare_literals loop
isomorphism.tie_breaking_unchanged: n/a: comparisons produce independent Bool lanes with no tie policy
isomorphism.floating_point: n/a: fast path is gated to DType::I64 and falls through for F64 and malformed elements
isomorphism.error_behavior: unchanged: arity, shape/broadcast mismatch, dtype mismatch, and non-I64 malformed literals fall through to the existing generic path
